features: Pack of 4 Hair Brush Set: Package includes radial brush, oblong brush, oval cushion brush and vent hair brush

Each of our brushes have soft bristles, with rounded ends. This helps to keep your scalp free from scratches and irritation. Aside from easily detangling and styling your hair, the bristles also massages your scalp.

Designed for wet or dry hair, works great on wet, dry, long, short, thick, curly, and detangler hair. The super soft bristles can pass through tangles and knots, minimizing pain, split ends and breakage.
Our collection of assorted hair brushes can be used both at home or on the go. Light and compact, they can easily fit inside your dresser drawer, or inside your handbag.
